content_body: This house has been AMAZING! We booked it a couple months ahead looking for a fun and adventurous trip and that is definitely what we got! We had three families with us and there was plenty of room! The kitchen was nice and roomy, but the VIEW!! The view was fantastic! You can see the Toccoa River from every part of the house. Even the view from the hot tub was amazing! The river was very cold but so fun to play in. The gazebo on the property was a great place to chill and talk; the fire pit was an wonderful place to get together, tell stories, and make s'mores. The stairs were a hike but definitely a good workout. There were many activities to do while staying here! We really recommend white water rafting! You have to do it! It is exhilirating and all the guides are amazing. The company we used was 'Rolling Thunder.' 10/10! We also really enjoyed the train ride, which stopped in McCaysville where we ate at 'The Copper Grill' (the grilled cheese BLT and cheese sticks were very good). The train was a relaxing eperience but I would advise you sit in the outside train cars because the inside cars are very cold. Also, tubing and kayaking down the river is another fun activity. Mercier's Orchards is definitely an aweseome experience as well. Lastly, though we didn't get to do this yet, we heard good things about going to 'The Swinging Bridge.' Hope everyone who stays here has fun! Enjoy your stay! ~The Hall, Lewis, and McDonald Families
title: This Vacation Was Amazing!
